name: Dartmouth College
meets_full_need_notes: Dartmouth meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. Families with income under $125,000 and typical assets typically pay nothing for tuition.
no_loan_notes: Dartmouth eliminated loans from financial aid packages in 2022. All aid is grant-based (Dartmouth Scholarship). No loans included in institutional packages.
ed_aid_implications: Dartmouth's financial aid is need-blind and identical for ED and RD applicants. Aid package released with ED decision. Binding commitment may be reconsidered if aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Dartmouth reviews appeals for changed financial circumstances. Submit Professional Judgment request to Office of Financial Aid with documentation.
